opening.line: Finally! I've been searching every stall in the city for this.
By the gods, it's beautiful. What's the damage, shopkeep?
You have a keen eye for stock. How much for this piece?
This is just the thing I've been looking for. What do you want for it?
I must have this. Tell me your price!
This caught my eye. What's your asking price?
I could use another one of these. What are you charging?
Let's talk business. What's the sticker price on this?
Not bad at all. How much are you looking to get?
I've seen worse quality. What's your best offer?
I'm in a hurry, so let's keep this quick. Price?
I'm not here for small talk. What do you want for this?
I hope you aren't planning on overcharging me. How much?
My purse is light today, so be gentle. What's the cost?
It's a bit dusty, isn't it? What's your price?

rejection.line: You've got a sense of humor, I'll give you that. Try again.
A bit rich for my blood. Can we find a middle ground?
I like you, but I don't like that price. Lower it.
Let's be realistic here. That's a bit high, isn't it?
I'm interested, but not at that price. Come down a bit.
We're drifting apart here. Give me a real number.
That's more than I'm willing to part with. Do better.
You're trying to retire on one sale! Lower it.
My interest is fading as fast as my patience. Better price?
I can get this for half that in the next town over.
One more price like that, and I'm out the door.
Don't take me for a fool. Give me your absolute best price now.
My boots are already pointed toward the exit. Last chance.
I've got better things to do than listen to these prices. Final offer?
You're wasting my time. Give me a reason to stay.

walkaway.line: Keep it then. I hope it rots on your shelf.
I'm not paying those prices. I'm going elsewhere.
What a joke. Try being a merchant instead of a thief.
I'm done here. You've lost a customer today.
I'll find it cheaper at the market. Goodbye.
Life's too short for this. I'm leaving.
You'll never sell anything at those rates. Good luck.

success.line: A steal! I'll be telling everyone about your shop.
Now that's what I call a bargain! Much appreciated.
I feel like I'm the one robbing you! Deal!
Incredible. You've got yourself a regular customer now.
Splendid! This is why I love shopping here.
Seems right to me. You've got a deal.
I can live with that. Here is your gold.
Reasonable enough. Let's shake on it.
A fair trade for a fair item. Thank you.
You're a shark, you know that? Fine, I'll take it.
My wallet is crying, but I need the item. Here.
I'm paying for the convenience, clearly. Take your coin.
You won this round, merchant. Don't expect me back soon.
It’s overpriced, but I'm desperate. Fine.
